feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2047 201 1846 96
TR 1894 172 1722 80

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Chemistry Periodic Table 2026
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺39,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺899,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Discover the Periodic Table like never before with our innovative 3D app! Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of elements in a completely new and visually stunning way. Our app offers you a minimalist and captivating experience that will make exploring the Periodic Table a uniquely engaging journey. With our intuitive interface and minimalist design, you can effortlessly navigate through the elements. Each element comes to life in a captivating 3D environment, allowing you to visualize its structure in a way you've never experienced before. Witness how elements interact with each other and uncover their properties in a completely new light. Want to learn more about a specific element? Our app provides detailed and easily understandable information about each element, covering everything from its physical and chemical properties to its history and practical uses. Learning about the Periodic Table has never been so accessible and exciting. Perfect for students, professionals, and science enthusiasts alike, our app caters to all. Whether you're studying chemistry or simply curious about the world of elements, our 3D app offers an educational and entertaining experience. Download now and dive into the beauty of the Periodic Table in a way you never imagined. Explore, learn, and marvel at the elements with our 3D app today!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Countless Army Mobile Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺79,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺79,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Have you ever dreamed of being the villain in a Tower Defense? Be the one who sends waves and waves of troops to break through the enemy defenses in this Reverse Tower Defense. Summon, conquer and upgrade your troops to dominate the whole world! Summon your troops and conquer! Choose the troops, the order and the path you’ll send in each wave. Think of your strategies to conquer each map. Invade countless map! Play through the kingdoms, each with their own features. Plains, forest, coast, wasteland, snowed mountains and desert, conquer everything on your own time. Unlock new troops and ipgrade them! Unlock units, choose their profession, upgrade the stats and change their skins. Conquer and hold kingdoms! Dominate each state of the region, advance without rest with your troops to conquer the whole world. But take care, the states can rebel. Characteristics: - 6 Kingdoms with 46 maps total. - 16 Enemy defenses. - 12 Troops to unlock, each with 2 different professions. - Many skins to each troop to use at your own liking. - 6 Spells to help the units through the waves. - A skilltree with more than 50 unlocks. - Changing climate, rain, clouds, storm, mist… you can face many of them in your conquest.

entry.title: Thumper: Pocket Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

Application Description

*** Winner of Apple Design Award 2019 *** Thumper is rhythm violence: classic action, blistering speed, and brutal physicality. You are a space beetle. Brave the void and confront a maniacal giant head. With this special pocket edition, you can play all nine epic levels with one hand. Hurtle forward, master new moves, and survive terrifying boss battles. Propelled by a pounding original soundtrack, you'll feel every crushing impact. To reach synesthetic bliss, you must conquer rhythm hell. ■ Features ■ ・ Nine epic levels ・ Adrenalizing boss battles ・ Psychedelic visuals and original soundtrack ・ Smooth 60 FPS in portrait and landscape (and up to 120 FPS on supported devices) ・ PLAY + mode (increased challenge and speed) ・ Full screen display on iPhone X ・ iCloud Sync ■ Please Note ■ Wireless headphones can add significant audio latency. For the best experience, wired headphones or integrated speakers are strongly recommended.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: MagicKit Pro: AI Smart Toolbox
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

MagicKit AI is a complete utility app designed to help you monitor your device, optimize performance, and access everyday tools from one convenient interface. Built specifically for iOS, MagicKit AI brings together essential features while maintaining your privacy and battery life. Device and System Tools • Battery Status: View current charge level and charging state • Storage Usage: Analyze available and used storage • Device Info: Check basic hardware and system details • Uptime Tracker: Monitor how long your device has been running • Battery Tips: Get practical advice to improve battery usage • Photo Cleaner: Detect and remove duplicate or similar photos to free up space • Contact Cleaner: Organize contacts by finding duplicates and incomplete entries • RAM Manager: Monitor memory usage and optimize performance • Device Benchmark: Test CPU, GPU, memory, and network performance Network Tools • Speed Test: Measure internet connection speed • Wi-Fi Info: See network name, IP address, and connection status • IP Lookup: Check geolocation of public IP addresses • Location Info: Track GPS location, speed, direction, and altitude Security & Privacy Tools • Password Generator: Create strong, secure passwords with customizable options • Passphrase Generator: Generate memorable and secure passphrases • UUID Generator: Create unique identifiers in various formats • Secure PIN Generator: Generate secure PIN codes with multiple options • Temporary Email: Create disposable email addresses for privacy protection Utility Tools • Unit Converter: Convert between different measurements • Currency & Crypto Converter: Get live exchange rates for fiat and cryptocurrencies • Date Time Calculator: Calculate differences between dates with business days support • Time Zone Converter: Convert time across various time zones with live updates and DST status • Countdown & Reminders: Create beautiful countdowns with customizable reminders and recurring events • Magic Counter: Track multiple counters with detailed statistics and streaks • QR Scanner: Scan QR codes instantly • Document & Card Scanner: Capture and save high-quality document scans with AI-powered text recognition • Compass and Level: Measure direction and level using device sensors • Orientation Lock: Lock screen orientation while using the app • Audio Meter: Measure surrounding sound levels using the microphone • Clipboard Manager: Access and manage copied text within the app session • Flashlight & Brightness: Turn on the device flashlight and adjust screen brightness • Note Taker: Create, organize, and manage notes with categories and iCloud backup • Universal Generator: Generate random data including text, numbers, dates, and more • Color Palettes Studio: Create, extract, and manage beautiful color palettes from images or manually using color pickers — perfect for designers and creatives Highlights • Clean and user-friendly interface with new wizard-based tools • Featured Tools section showcasing the most popular utilities • No ads or in-app purchases • Lightweight and battery-efficient • Compatible with all iOS devices • Frequent updates with new tools • Built with privacy and performance in mind • Dark/Light theme support with smooth animations Perfect for • Device monitoring and optimization • Everyday measurement and conversion tasks • Scanning documents and QR codes • Cleaning up photo storage and contacts • Creating and managing countdowns with reminders • Tracking habits and progress with multiple counters • Accessing quick tools like flashlight and brightness control • Performing simple network diagnostics • Generating secure passwords and managing privacy • Taking quick notes and organizing information • Designing and managing color palettes for creative projects Download MagicKit AI today and simplify your daily tasks with one smart, powerful toolkit.

entry.title: Dungeon Tracer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → ₺45,00 [₺45,00 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺45,00

Application Description

Survive in endless dungeons by connecting blocks to attack, defend, and heal. Dungeon Tracer is a roguelike puzzle RPG that combines strategic turn-based combat with dungeon exploration. Connect identical blocks to unleash powerful sword attacks, shield defenses, and life-saving potions. Your decisions each turn shape the outcome of battles and your survival. ■ Recommended for - Players who enjoy puzzle RPGs and roguelikes - Fans of turn-based strategy combat - Those seeking offline dungeon adventures - Gamers who love crafting new builds and strategies through replay ■ Core Gameplay - Connect blocks to attack, defend, and heal - Every turn's choice impacts your strategy - Combo effects grow stronger with longer connections - Embrace the roguelike challenge where death means starting anew - Develop survival strategies in ever-changing scenarios ■ In-Depth Strategic Combat Experience the blend of intuitive block connection puzzles and the tactical depth of roguelike RPGs. Your play style varies with block placements, enemy types, skill selections, and item combinations. ■ 10 Classes and 10 Races Each class features unique skills and traits. Combine these with racial traits for diverse builds. Experiment to find your ideal strategy. ■ Diverse Skills and Builds Mix over 40 active skills and growth elements to create your unique combat style. Each skill and item choice leads to different outcomes. ■ Special Monsters and Block Debuffs Face 43 unique monsters, including liches, avengers, kamikazes, and assassins. Block debuffs like freeze, fire, poison, and lock can turn the tide of battle. Simply connecting blocks won't guarantee victory. ■ Fair Roguelike Challenge A seed-based deterministic random system ensures consistent results in each run. Enjoy a challenge where strategy and judgment outweigh luck. ■ More Fun with Repeated Growth Skill choices evolve with each level-up Builds focus on upgrades and items Dungeons reconfigure with each playthrough A structure where a single mistake heightens the tension ■ Global Leaderboard Compete with players worldwide. Test your skills against global rankings and showcase your best scores. ■ 4 Difficulty Levels Choose from Easy, Normal, Hard, and Very Hard Enjoyable challenges for both newcomers and veterans. ■ Premium Offline RPG - No ads - No in-app purchases - Enjoy offline play Once purchased, access all content fully. ■ Support for Multiple Languages and Cloud Save Supports 22 languages, ensuring you can continue your adventure seamlessly across devices. Endless dungeons await, filled with powerful monsters and strategic choices. How long can you survive? Experience the depth of puzzle roguelike RPGs in Dungeon Tracer today!

entry.title: Chemistry Periodic Table 2026
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺39,99 [Free ~ ₺899,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺39,99

Application Description

Discover the Periodic Table like never before with our innovative 3D app! Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of elements in a completely new and visually stunning way. Our app offers you a minimalist and captivating experience that will make exploring the Periodic Table a uniquely engaging journey. With our intuitive interface and minimalist design, you can effortlessly navigate through the elements. Each element comes to life in a captivating 3D environment, allowing you to visualize its structure in a way you've never experienced before. Witness how elements interact with each other and uncover their properties in a completely new light. Want to learn more about a specific element? Our app provides detailed and easily understandable information about each element, covering everything from its physical and chemical properties to its history and practical uses. Learning about the Periodic Table has never been so accessible and exciting. Perfect for students, professionals, and science enthusiasts alike, our app caters to all. Whether you're studying chemistry or simply curious about the world of elements, our 3D app offers an educational and entertaining experience. Download now and dive into the beauty of the Periodic Table in a way you never imagined. Explore, learn, and marvel at the elements with our 3D app today!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone
